title: The Application of Positive End-Expiratory Pressure in Out-of-Hospital Cardiac Arrest: The Lazarus-PEEP Trial.

skipped_criteria: CPR Administration by ALS team: no schema field exists for EMS crew level or CPR administration status.
Intubation and Ventilation: no schema field exists to indicate whether the patient has been successfully intubated and ventilated during resuscitation.

Traumatic cardiac arrest (including drowning, penetrating/blunt injury, burns): mechanism field captures some trauma types but 'drowning' is not an allowed enum value, and the criterion requires excluding cardiac arrest caused by any of these mechanisms — partially expressible but cannot cleanly exclude all listed sub-types without risking incorrect exclusions; skipped in full to avoid incomplete logic.
Immediate ROSC before intubation: no schema field exists for timing of ROSC relative to intubation.
Mechanical ventilation prior to arrest for reasons other than the arrest: no schema field exists for pre-existing mechanical ventilation status.
DNR or advanced directive orders: no schema field exists for code status or advance directives.
Failure to intubate: no schema field exists for intubation success/failure status.
Enrollment in other interventional clinical trials: no schema field exists for concurrent trial enrollment.
